title: BetterDC
description:
BetterDC:
BetterDC connects your Minecraft server with Discord, allowing you to monitor and manage server activities more effectively. It synchronizes chat, logs player activities, and provides automated moderation.
body:
**BetterDC:**
BetterDC connects your Minecraft server with Discord, allowing you to monitor and manage server activities more effectively. It synchronizes chat, logs player activities, and provides automated moderation. [More Information](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/betterdc.118626/).

Key Features:

    **Sync Minecraft Chat with Discord:**
        Messages from Minecraft appear in a specified Discord channel.
        Messages sent from the channel will be seen in-game!
        Customizable message formatting for different users.
    **Log Player Activities:**
        Record player joins, quits, deaths, and command usage in a private Discord channel.
        This channel is seperate from the chat channel!
    **Automated Moderation:**
        Automatically mute players for using blacklisted words.
        Send notifications to Discord when a player is muted.
    **Customizable Settings:**
        Easily configure bot token, channel IDs, and chat colors in config.yml.

If you need help, refer to the [Plugin Documentation](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/betterdc.118626/field?field=documentation) or Community Support. Our [Discord](https://discord.gg/taqmXUVC2t). More updates coming soon!
